content:
MEMBER REGISTRATION — EMAIL + PHONE VERIFICATION FLOW

Repository:
ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1

Goal:
Create a premium 3-screen member registration flow.

Do not ask for KYC or government ID during signup.
KYC only starts when user clicks Invest Now.

SCREEN 1 — CREATE FREE ACCOUNT

Fields:
- First Name
- Last Name
- Email
- Mobile Phone
- Country
- Password
- Accept Terms

Button:
Create Free Account

After submit:
- Create user account
- Save member profile
- Send email verification
- Send SMS verification code
- Go to verification screen

SCREEN 2 — VERIFY EMAIL + PHONE

Show two verification cards:

1. Email Verification
- Email sent to user
- 6-digit code or verification link
- Resend email button
- Status: Pending / Verified

2. Phone Verification
- SMS code sent to phone
- 6-digit code input
- Resend SMS button
- Status: Pending / Verified

User cannot enter dashboard until:
- Email verified
- Phone verified

Button:
Continue to Dashboard

SCREEN 3 — MEMBER DASHBOARD

After both verified:
- Open member dashboard
- Show welcome message
- Show featured opportunities
- Show IVX AI assistant
- Show profile completion
- Show Invest Now buttons

KYC RULE

Only trigger KYC when user clicks:
Invest Now

Then ask for:
- Passport or Driver License
- Selfie/liveness if required
- Proof of address if required
- AML/KYC screening

DATABASE

Create/update tables if needed:
- members
- member_verifications
- verification_codes
- audit_logs

Track:
- email_verified
- phone_verified
- verification_status
- created_at
- last_login_at
- kyc_status

API ENDPOINTS

Build/verify:
- POST /api/members/register
- POST /api/members/send-email-code
- POST /api/members/verify-email
- POST /api/members/send-phone-code
- POST /api/members/verify-phone
- GET /api/members/me
- POST /api/members/start-kyc

UI REQUIREMENTS

Design:
- black background
- IVX gold accents
- premium card layout
- mobile-first
- simple 3-step progress indicator
- clear errors
- resend timer
- loading states
- success states

DEPLOYMENT

After implementation:
1. Run typecheck
2. Run tests
3. Commit to GitHub
4. Push to main
5. Trigger Render deploy
6. Verify production

FINAL PROOF

Return only:

REPO:
BRANCH:
COMMIT_SHA:
FILES_CHANGED:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
HEALTH_STATUS:
REGISTER_STATUS:
EMAIL_VERIFY_STATUS:
PHONE_VERIFY_STATUS:
DASHBOARD_ACCESS_STATUS:
KYC_DEFERRED_STATUS:
ERRORS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

COMPLETE only if:
- user can register
- email verification works
- phone verification works
- dashboard opens after verification
- KYC does not appear until Invest Now, put this same as landi page same as app too for members registration sync
